intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant Diptera cortusifolia. However, I can provide information on Dipteryx odorata, a plant that is commonly referred to by the name of Dipteryx.

Dipteryx odorata, commonly known as tonka bean tree, is a plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The tonka bean, obtained from the seed of this plant, has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Dipteryx odorata include coumarins, alkaloids, and fatty acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with tonka bean include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to promote relaxation and improve mood.
